title: Figure
description: A figure from a rrxiv paper. Figures don't participate in the claim graph in v0.1; they're targetable by annotations (e.g. dataset_link).

id.description: Stable figure ID within the paper.

label.description: LaTeX label, e.g. 'fig:rho'. Matches \label{} inside the figure environment.

uri.description: URI to the figure file (PDF, PNG, SVG). May be absolute or relative — relative URIs resolve against `paper.source.uri` (RRP-0015).

referenced_in.description: IDs of sections or claims that reference this figure via \ref{}.

examples.label: fig:rho
examples.caption: Distribution of the load parameter rho across our 10k-paper sample.
